aiToWorkDialog.startBridge: In a terminal, from the project root, run:
aiToWorkDialog.title: AI To Work

assignReleaseDescription: Assign this item to a release version.

bugRecorder.categoryFixed: This will be created as a Bug Fix
bugRecorder.maxDurationWarning: Recording will stop automatically in 30 seconds
bugRecorder.permissionError: Screen share permission was denied. Please allow screen sharing and try again.
bugRecorder.recordInstructions: Click start to share your screen and microphone. Show us the bug while you explain what happened.
bugRecorder.subtitle: Record your screen to show us what happened
bugRecorder.title: Report a Bug
bugRecorder.titlePlaceholder: e.g., Button click crashes the schedule view
bugRecorder.transcriptionError: Failed to transcribe audio. The bug report will be created without a transcript.
bugRecorder.uploadError: Failed to upload recording. Please try again.
bugRecorder.videoNotSupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.

configureColumnsDescription: Add, remove, or reorder Kanban columns. Items in a removed column will move to Backlog.
confirmDeleteAttachment: Are you sure you want to delete this attachment? This action cannot be undone.
createReleaseDescription: Create a new release to group completed features.
deleteItemConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this roadmap item? This action cannot be undone.
description: This is the official roadmap where you can submit and upvote feature requests. Help shape the future by sharing ideas and voting on what matters most to you. Check back often to see what's planned, in progress, and recently launched!
editItemDescription: Update the details of this roadmap item
newItemDescription: Add a new feature, improvement, or task to your roadmap
noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!

displaySettingsTab.description: Control how many columns are visible on your task board at once
displaySettingsTab.superCompactDescription: Narrowest columns; fit more on screen
displaySettingsTab.taskStatusConfigDescription: Customize your project's task workflow by adding, editing, or reordering status columns. Drag and drop to reorder.
displaySettingsTab.title: Display Settings

removeColumnDescription: Are you sure you want to remove "{{column}}"? Items in this column will move to Backlog.

shortcuts.description: Use these keyboard shortcuts to navigate and manage your roadmap efficiently
shortcuts.title: Shortcuts

suggestions.description: Select suggestions to import into your roadmap as Backlog items
suggestions.title: AI Feature Suggestions

title: Feature Roadmap
videoUrlUnavailable: Video URL unavailable. Try refreshing or download the file.
